sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, description String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (1, 'ClickHouse is fast and scalable.'), (2, 'A database for OLAP.')
UPDATE test_table SET description = 'ClickHouse is an analytical database.' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT wordShingleSimHashCaseInsensitive(description, 2) AS Hash FROM test_table WHERE id = 2;
